title: Vilamal Pathanchali Manoharar Temple
tagline: Vilamal Pathanchali Manoharar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Vilamal Pathanchali Manoharar Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vilamal Pathanchali Manoharar Temple ( Tamil: விளமல் பதஞ்சலி மனோகரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Vilamal in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Vilamal Pathanchali Manoharar Temple ( Tamil: விளமல் பதஞ்சலி மனோகரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Vilamal in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Pathanchali Manoharar. His consort, Parvati, is known as Yazhinum Menmozhiyaal.

topPlaces.name: Devarkandanallur
topPlaces.description: Devarkandanallur is a village in the Thiruvarur taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Agarathirunallur
topPlaces.description: Agarathirunallur is a village in the Kudavasal taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur
topPlaces.description: Thyagaraja Temple is a Shiva temple, located in the town of Thiruvarur in Tamil Nadu state, India. Shiva is worshiped in the form of a lingam as Thyagarajaswami, also known as Putridankondar.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvarur
topPlaces.description: Thiruvarur (Tamil: [t̪iɾuʋaːɾuːɾ]) also spelt as Tiruvarur is a town in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the administrative headquarters of Thiruvarur district and Thiruvarur taluk.

topPlaces.name: Bhaktavatsala Perumal temple, Tirukannamangai
topPlaces.description: The Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple is a temple dedicated to Hindu god Vishnu, located in Thirukannamangai, a village in Tiruvarur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is counted as one among the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Dakshinakokarnesvarar Temple, Pulivalam
topPlaces.description: Dakshinakokarnesvarar Temple, Pulivalam is a Shiva temple in Pulivalam in Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu (India).

topPlaces.name: Alivalam
topPlaces.description: Alivalam is a village in the Tiruvarur taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Formerly this village was called 'Arivalam'.

topPlaces.name: Dharmapureesvarar Temple, Vadakandam
topPlaces.description: Dharmapureesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Vadakandam in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Devarkandanallur is a village in the Thiruvarur taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

Thiruvarur (Tamil: [t̪iɾuʋaːɾuːɾ]) also spelt as Tiruvarur is a town in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is the administrative headquarters of Thiruvarur district and Thiruvarur taluk.

The Bhaktavatsala Perumal Temple is a temple dedicated to Hindu god Vishnu, located in Thirukannamangai, a village in Tiruvarur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Constructed in Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is counted as one among the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu.
Dakshinakokarnesvarar Temple, Pulivalam is a Shiva temple in Pulivalam in Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu (India).
Alivalam is a village in the Tiruvarur taluk of Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Formerly this village was called 'Arivalam'.
Dharmapureesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Vadakandam in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vilamal Pathanchali Manoharar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vilamal Pathanchali Manoharar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vilamal Pathanchali Manoharar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (99 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (101 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vilamal Pathanchali Manoharar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vilamal Pathanchali Manoharar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vilamal Pathanchali Manoharar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vilamal Pathanchali Manoharar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vilamal Pathanchali Manoharar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Devarkandanallur, Agarathirunallur, Thyagaraja Temple, Tiruvarur, Thiruvarur, Bhaktavatsala Perumal temple, Tirukannamangai.
